qry:select.name: qryCompetencia
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $f in sql(' SELECT c.oi_competencia, c.c_competencia AS COD, c.d_competencia AS DES, opc.n_ponderacion AS PON, c.t_competencia AS OBS FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS AS c, ORG04_POSIC_COMP AS opc, ORG04_POSICIONES AS op, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS ppe JOIN c.oi_competencia INNER opc.oi_competencia, opc.oi_posicion INNER op.oi_posicion, op.oi_posicion INNER ppe.oi_posicion_ult WHERE ppe.oi_personal_emp = {%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %} UNION SELECT c.oi_competencia, c.c_competencia AS COD, c.d_competencia AS DES, opc.n_ponderacion AS PON, c.t_competencia AS OBS FROM ORG21_COMPETENCIAS AS c, ORG04_PUESTO_COMP AS opc, ORG04_PUESTOS AS op, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS ppe JOIN c.oi_competencia INNER opc.oi_competencia, opc.oi_puesto INNER op.oi_puesto, op.oi_puesto INNER ppe.oi_puesto_ult WHERE ppe.oi_personal_emp = {%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %} AND c.oi_competencia NOT IN ( SELECT opc1.oi_competencia FROM ORG04_POSIC_COMP AS opc1, ORG04_POSICIONES AS op1, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS ppe1 JOIN opc1.oi_posicion INNER op1.oi_posicion, op1.oi_posicion INNER ppe1.oi_posicion_ult WHERE ppe1.oi_personal_emp = {%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %} ) ')/ROWS/ROW
